signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual CPI Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual CPI Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's headline annual CPI inflation rose to 2.16% in March 2026 from 2.00% in February, marking a recent uptick driven by a 0.34% month-on-month increase, as reported by Statistics Korea via rateinflation.com[2]. signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders & 148 Million Daily Non-Vote Transactions on April 14, 2026** | YES
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders & 148 Million Daily Non-Vote Transactions on April 14, 2026** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][5]

Solana's network achieved these all-time highs today, signaling unprecedented adoption amid the Alpenglow consensus upgrade progressing toward 150ms transaction finality, which could boost scalability and attract prediction market bets on performance[1].
